title: Sanitatem
overview: Power Blackouts in Europe separate Ilay from his family - In his destroyed home country Germany, he is trying to find insulin to save, what's left from his family. In a brutal fight with two brothers, Ilay saves the young doctor Loana, who is trying to help him now. Ilay notices that Loana is not alone in this apocalyptic world, but takes her with him because she is his daughter’s only chance of survival.
